get.summary: Get a paginated list of tokens, optionally filter by type.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: tokenType
parameters.description: Filter by token type (erc20, erc721, erc777, erc1155)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of tokens per page, Max 100 per page

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: contractAddress
parameters.description: The contract address of the token in hexadecimal format or an ENS name.

get.summary: Get balance by wallet, token, and block number for a given network.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: walletAddress
parameters.description: The wallet address or ENS name of the user.

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: The contract address of the token.

parameters.name: blockNumber
parameters.description: The block number for which the balance is requested.

get.summary: Get allowance by owner, spender, token, and block number for a given network.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The ENS name or address of the owner in hexadecimal format.

parameters.name: spender
parameters.description: The ENS name or address of the spender in hexadecimal format.

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: The contract address of the token in hexadecimal format.

parameters.name: blockNumber
parameters.description: The block number for which the allowance is requested.

get.summary: Get token supply by token address and block number for a given network.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: The contract address of the token or ENS name.

parameters.name: blockNumber
parameters.description: The block number for which the token supply is requested.

get.summary: Get token metadata by contract address and token ID for a given network.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: API version, currently only v1 is supported

parameters.name: networkName
parameters.description: Blockchain network, currently only eth-mainnet is supported

parameters.name: contractAddress
parameters.description: The contract address of the token or ENS name.

parameters.name: tokenId
parameters.description: The token ID for the ERC721 or ERC1155 token.

info.title: Histori API
info.description: API for token data and historical balances

contractAddress.description: Token contract address in hexadecimal format

blockNumber.description: Block number at the time of token creation

tokenType.description: Type of the token (e.g., ERC20, ERC721, ERC777, ERC1155)

name.description: Token name (required for all token types)

symbol.description: Token symbol (required for all token types)

decimals.description: Number of decimals for ERC20 tokens

holder.description: Wallet address of the token holder in hexadecimal format

contractAddress.description: Token contract address in hexadecimal format

blockNumber.description: Block number at the time the balance was recorded

contractAddress.description: The contract address of the token in hexadecimal format.

owner.description: The ENS name or address of the owner.

spender.description: The ENS name or address of the spender.

allowance.description: The allowance amount. Optional for ERC721 and ERC1155 tokens, which do not have a specific allowance value.

blockNumber.description: The block number for which the allowance is requested.

tokenType.description: The type of token: erc20, erc721, erc777, or erc1155.

tokenId.description: The token ID, used for non-fungible tokens like ERC721 and ERC1155. Optional.

contractAddress.description: Token contract address in hexadecimal format

blockNumber.description: Block number at the time of the snapshot

totalSupply.description: Total supply of the token at the given block number

contractAddress.description: Contract address in hexadecimal format (20 bytes)
